episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 392: Intro to Lorcana
episode.description: James & Cliff walk you through all the latest MTGFinance news including the weekly Meta Analysis, Fast Movers, Cards to Watch and share thoughts on the blockbuster Lorcana card game release.
